Ag.function:
$ -------------------------------------
 PARAMETER G(FCC_A1,AG:VA;0) 298.15 GHSERAG; 3000 N !
 
 PARAMETER G(HCP_A3,AG:VA;0) 298.15 GHCPAG; 3000 N !
 
 PARAMETER G(BCC_A2,AG:VA;0) 298.15 GBCCAG; 3000 N !
 
 PARAMETER G(LIQUID,AG;0) 298.15 GLIQAG; 3000 N !

$ Source of data: Assessment of the Ag-Al system
$ S S Lim, P L Rossiter and J W Tibballs; CALPHAD, 1995, 19(2),
$ 131-142. "Assessment of the Al-Ag binary phase diagram"
 PARAMETER G(CUB_A13,AG:VA;0) 298.15 3400-1.05*T+GHSERAG; 3000 N !

$ Oh, Shim, Lee and Lee
$ J. Alloys Compounds, 1996, 238, 155-66
$ A thermodynamic study on the Ag-Sb-Sn system
 PARAMETER G(BCT_A5,AG;0) 298.15 4184.1+GHSERAG; 3000 N !

$ Added by atd 12/3/2004 for Ag-Zn system
 PARAMETER G(HCP_ZN,AG:VA;0) 298.15 400+0.3*T+GHSERAG; 3000 N !

Cd.function:
PARAMETER G(HCP_A3,CD:VA;0) 298.15 GHSERCD; 1600 N !
 
 PARAMETER G(LIQUID,CD;0) 298.15 GLIQCD; 1600 N !
 
$From Zakulski, Moser, Rzyman et al. J. Phase Equil. 1993,14(2),184-196
 PARAMETER G(FCC_A1,CD:VA;0) 298.15 GFCCCD; 1600 N !
 
$From Zakulski, Moser, Rzyman et al. J. Phase Equil. 1993,14(2),184-196

$ Source of data: Assessment of data the Cd-Hg system
$ Jang, Silk, Watson, Bryant, Chart and Argent, CALPHAD, 1995, 19(3), 
$ 415. "The thermodynamics and phase diagrams of the Cd-Hg and Cd-Hg-Te
$ systems"
 PARAMETER G(RHOMBO_A10,CD;0) 298.15 800-0.62*T+GHSERCD; 1600 N !

$ Source of data: Assessment of data the Cd-Hg system
$ Jang, Silk, Watson, Bryant, Chart and Argent, CALPHAD, 1995, 19(3), 
$ 415. "The thermodynamics and phase diagrams of the Cd-Hg and Cd-Hg-Te
$ systems"
 PARAMETER G(BCT_A5,CD;0) 298.15 5000+GHSERCD; 1600 N !

 PARAMETER G(BCC_A2,CD:VA;0) 298.15 GBCCCD; 1600 N !

Hg.function:
PARAMETER G(LIQUID,HG;0) 200 GHSERHG; 2000 N !
 
 PARAMETER G(RHOMBO_A10,HG;0) 200 GRHOMBHG; 2000 N !

$ Source of data: Assessment of data the Cd-Hg system
$ Jang, Silk, Watson, Bryant, Chart and Argent, CALPHAD, 1995, 19(3), 
$ 415. "The thermodynamics and phase diagrams of the Cd-Hg and Cd-Hg-Te
$ systems"
 PARAMETER G(TETRAGONAL_A6,HG;0) 200 -10459.721+125.04019*T-28.847*T*LN(T)
 +16.99705E-3*T**2-24.555667E-6*T**3+13330*T**(-1); 234.32 Y
 -11216.714+137.69375*T-30.2091*T*LN(T)+1.07555E-3*T**2-0.228298E-6*T**3
 +35545*T**(-1); 2000 N !

$ Source of data: Assessment of data the Cd-Hg system
$ Jang, Silk, Watson, Bryant, Chart and Argent, CALPHAD, 1995, 19(3), 
$ 415. "The thermodynamics and phase diagrams of the Cd-Hg and Cd-Hg-Te
$ systems"
 PARAMETER G(HCP_A3,HG:VA;0) 200 GHCPHG; 2000 N !

$ Maitre A; Fiorani J M; Vilasi M; J Phase Equilib; 2002, 23(4), 329
 PARAMETER G(FCC_A1,HG:VA;0) 200.00 GFCCHG; 2000 N !

In.function:
PARAMETER G(TETRAGONAL_A6,IN;0) 298.15 GHSERIN; 3800 N !

$ Data from Boa and Ansara; Thermochimica Acta 1998, 314, 79-86

 PARAMETER G(BCC_A2,IN:VA;0) 298.15 GBCCIN; 3800 N !
 
$ Tet_alpha1 is the same phase as InSn_beta. Data are taken from unpublished
$ assessment of the In-Sn system from Himo Ansara
 PARAMETER G(TET_ALPHA1,IN;0) 298.15 123-0.1988*T+GHSERIN; 3800 N !

$ Source of data: Unpublished assessment of the In-Sn system by
$ Himo Ansara
